warnings.data_age: ⚠️ {provider} data is {minutes} minutes old. The station may not be reporting.
warnings.missing_elevation: ⚠️ Elevation is missing. Absolute pressure and thermodynamics were computed with elevation 0; enter the elevation in the sidebar for better accuracy.

ranking.intro: Today's top 10 by max temperature, min temperature, wind gust and rainfall.
ranking.order_help: Flip the order to see the other extreme (lowest highs, highest lows).
ranking.no_country: Couldn't determine your country from the location. Use the map to set your position.
ranking.country_empty: No ranking data for {provider} yet today.

header.connect_prompt: Connect your station from the side panel or explore nearby stations.
header.manual_station: ℹ️ Manual NWS station: reports daily max/min once a day. No real-time data.

improvements: Complete, functional migration to FastAPI mode.
New Ranking tab, with temperature, wind and precipitation rankings by country and globally.
New IEM provider, adding more than 100,000 stations worldwide.
Complete redesign of the Map tab.
New country filter on the map.
New filter for available sensors on the map.
Available sensors are now shown as metadata for each station.
New filter to show stations with historical data available on the map.
Historical data is now available for the WeatherLink network.
fixes: Fixed an error that prevented wind values from being shown even when the provider measured them.
Fixed an error in the count of tropical and torrid nights in the Historical tab.
Fixed an issue that prevented the full pressure trend from being calculated correctly.
Fixed an error that caused AEMET and MeteoGalicia temperature highs and lows to show incorrect values.
Fixed an error that caused MeteoGalicia maximum gust values to show incorrectly.
previous_improvements: Two new data providers added: Met Office and MeteoHub Italy.
A favourites system has been added for quick access to any station.
A new precipitation chart has been added.
The weekly charts display has been improved.
The Sky clarity card now shows twilights.
The initial loading time of the web app has been reduced.
Definitions have been added to the charts in the Trends tab.
previous_fixes: Fixed an error that showed incorrect data in the Puertos del Estado tide gauges.
Fixed caching issues when switching between stations.
Fixed an error that prevented the synoptic series in the Trends tab from being shown, even when the provider returned the data.
Fixed an error that prevented trend charts from some providers from being displayed.
Fixed an error that prevented sunrise and sunset from being shown in local time.
Fixed an error that showed incorrect temperature and humidity highs and lows in Meteocat.
Fixed an error that prevented querying the current year's history in Weather Underground.

cards.tooltip_unavailable: Definition not available yet for this variable.

connection.title: Connect station
connection.caption: Click Save to remember ID, API key and altitude in this browser and add it to favorites.
connection.weatherlink_session_caption: WeatherLink loads your stations with the API Key and API Secret. If you click Save, they are remembered separately from Weather Underground in this browser.
connection.api_key_help: These details may be stored locally in this browser if you use Save. If you share this device or browser profile, someone else could reuse them. It is safer to store the API key in your device or browser password manager.
connection.api_secret_help: WeatherLink requires the API Secret to be sent as the X-Api-Secret header. If you save it, it is stored locally in this browser.
connection.weatherlink_favorite_name_help: Leave empty to use the name reported by WeatherLink. Handy when the API only exposes a numeric code.

autoconnect.missing_credentials: To enable WU auto-connect, fill in Station ID and API Key.

messages.weatherlink_credentials_rejected: WeatherLink rejected the API Key or API Secret. Use the v2 credentials generated at WeatherLink.com > Account > Generate v2 Key; a Weather Underground key or your login password will not work.
messages.weatherlink_no_stations: WeatherLink returned no stations for these credentials.

notes.implemented_providers: For now, History is implemented for WU, WeatherLink, IEM, Meteocat, AEMET, Meteo-France, MeteoGalicia and Frost. The shared calculation layer is already in place to extend it to other providers.

notes.missing_sensors: The station does not have {sensors}, so {calculations} cannot be calculated.

tooltips.theta_e: A quantity that jointly represents air temperature, humidity, and pressure. It is approximately conserved during moist adiabatic ascent and descent, so it is useful for identifying changes in air mass. Surface variations can be caused by radiative heating or cooling, changes in moisture content, vertical mixing, or advection.
tooltips.mixing_ratio: Mixing ratio (r). Mass of water vapor per unit mass of dry air. Its variations help detect changes in atmospheric moisture content and can indicate the arrival of a drier or more humid air mass. They can also be caused by evaporation, precipitation, or vertical mixing.
tooltips.uv: Vector decomposition of wind into its zonal and meridional components. The u component (zonal) represents west–east motion: positive values indicate wind coming from the west and negative values from the east. The v component (meridional) represents south–north motion: positive values indicate wind coming from the south and negative values from the north. This makes it possible to analyze zonal and meridional advection intensity separately.
